## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`.githooks/commit-msg` passes)
- [ ] `task lint` is clean (clippy + fmt)
- [ ] `task test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] If rules changed: `rules/combined.yaml` regenerated via `task rules`
- [ ] No secrets, CA keys, personal data, or AI-assistant attribution added
